user.title: Solar Location
user.description: Enter your location for solar irradiance forecasts from Open-Meteo. API key is optional (free tier: 10,000 calls/day).

tariff.title: Electricity Tariff
tariff.description: Set your import prices for each period (EUR/kWh). Uses Spain 2.0TD time bands: Valley 00-08, Shoulder 08-10 + 14-18 + 22-24, Peak 10-14 + 18-22.

sensors.title: Sensors & Inverter Type
sensors.description: Select your battery SoC sensor and inverter type.

inverter_goodwe.title: GoodWe Inverter
inverter_goodwe.description: Select the GoodWe operation mode entity. The integration will switch between eco_charge, eco_discharge, and general modes.

inverter_generic.title: Inverter Control Entities
inverter_generic.description: Map the HA entities used to control your inverter.
